content:
IVX HOLDINGS — BUILD 11 FINAL SYNCHRONIZATION, TIMEOUT COMPLETION AND APK DELIVERY

OBJECTIVE

Finish Build 11 completely.

Do not create Build 12 unless Build 11 cannot be corrected safely.

Current known status:

- APK generated: ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build11.apk
- GitHub HEAD: d7040ef
- Render live: d4cbfc2e
- APK embedded marker does not match both
- Production deployment is behind GitHub
- Public APK URL is unavailable
- Staged timeout handling is incomplete
- Backend request-status/idempotency endpoints are incomplete
- Full automated tests are incomplete

This release is NOT complete until all commits, deployments and APK metadata match.

==================================================
1. FIX RELEASE MISMATCH
==================================================

Determine the exact intended release commit.

Then ensure:

GitHub HEAD
=
Render deployed SHA
=
/version SHA
=
APK embedded SHA

If d7040ef is the intended release:

1. Push and verify d7040ef on the correct production branch.
2. Trigger Render deployment.
3. Wait for deployment completion.
4. Verify /health.
5. Verify /version returns d7040ef.
6. Rebuild the APK from d7040ef if the current APK contains another marker.

If d4cbfc2e is the intended release:

1. Explain why d7040ef must not be deployed.
2. Revert or isolate the newer commit safely.
3. Rebuild the APK from d4cbfc2e.

Do not leave production, GitHub and APK on different commits.

==================================================
2. COMPLETE THE TIMEOUT ARCHITECTURE
==================================================

Implement the missing staged timeout UX:

- 15 seconds: show Still working
- 45 seconds: perform one safe retry if no backend request started
- 90 seconds: query backend status by traceId
- 180 seconds: fail gracefully with exact evidence

Required timeout details:

- traceId
- requestId
- conversationId
- messageId
- last successful checkpoint
- failed checkpoint
- request started YES/NO
- HTTP status
- retry count
- network status
- app version
- build number
- commit SHA

Add Retry and Cancel actions.

No infinite spinner.

==================================================
3. IMPLEMENT BACKEND REQUEST CONTROL
==================================================

Create and verify:

POST /api/ivx/owner-ai/request
GET /api/ivx/owner-ai/request/:traceId/status
POST /api/ivx/owner-ai/request/:traceId/retry
POST /api/ivx/owner-ai/request/:traceId/cancel

Every request must include:

- traceId
- requestId
- conversationId
- messageId
- idempotency key
- status
- retry count
- provider request ID
- timestamps
- terminal result
- structured error

The same idempotency key must never create duplicate AI replies.

==================================================
4. VERIFY ALL EXECUTION ROOTS
==================================================

Confirm all of these use the same IVXOwnerAIOrchestrator:

1. Send button
2. Keyboard send
3. Voice send
4. Attachment send
5. Deal Review
6. Investor Reply
7. Doc Summary
8. Owner command
9. AI-only mode
10. Local-first mode
11. Retry
12. Offline recovery
13. Reconnect recovery
14. App resume
15. Non-AI branch

Remove any remaining:

- void triggerAIWithRetry(...)
- unawaited Promise
- empty catch
- swallowed rejection
- mutation skipped after send success
- stale mutation reference
- old watchdog branch

==================================================
5. RUN COMPLETE TEST MATRIX
==================================================

Run and return real output for:

- TypeScript
- Lint
- Unit tests
- Integration tests
- Owner AI orchestrator tests
- Watchdog tests
- Timeout tests
- Retry tests
- Cancellation tests
- Idempotency tests
- Duplicate-tap tests
- App background/resume tests
- Network switch tests
- Android release build
- APK bundle inspection

Minimum required:

- 20 send-root tests
- 10 orchestrator lifecycle tests
- 10 watchdog tests
- 10 network/recovery tests
- 5 duplicate-send tests
- 5 idempotency tests
- 5 timeout/retry/cancel tests

No skipped critical tests.

==================================================
6. PRODUCTION VERIFICATION
==================================================

Verify:

- /health = HTTP 200
- /version = intended release SHA
- /readiness = HTTP 200
- Owner AI proxy = HTTP 200
- Database healthy
- Realtime healthy
- AI provider healthy

Run one real production Owner AI request and return:

- traceId
- checkpoints reached
- HTTP result
- response persistence result
- UI delivery result

==================================================
7. REBUILD FINAL APK
==================================================

Generate the final synchronized artifact.

Preferred filename:

ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build11-final.apk

Use versionCode 11 only if this remains the same corrected release.

If a new versionCode is required, use 12 and explain why.

Verify inside the actual APK:

- Correct Git SHA
- Correct API base URL
- New orchestrator
- Staged timeout logic
- Retry and Cancel
- Status endpoint integration
- No obsolete timeout execution path
- No fire-and-forget AI call
- No active Vercel AI Gateway URL, if migration has already been approved

Return:

- Filename
- Version
- versionCode
- Package name
- SHA-256
- File size
- Build timestamp
- Embedded Git SHA
- Signing result

==================================================
8. DELIVER THE APK
==================================================

Attach the APK directly in Rork chat or upload it to an accessible HTTPS location.

Do not return only:

- /home/user/...
- /tmp/...
- a local Rork sandbox path
- a screenshot
- a report

The owner must be able to tap the link on Android and download the APK.

==================================================
9. FINAL OUTPUT
==================================================

Return only:

1. Root causes fixed
2. GitHub HEAD SHA
3. Render live SHA
4. /version SHA
5. APK embedded SHA
6. SHA consistency result
7. Tests passed/failed
8. Production request evidence
9. APK filename
10. APK SHA-256
11. Direct APK attachment or HTTPS URL
12. Real Android QA status
13. Remaining issues

FINAL ACCEPTANCE

Complete only when:

- GitHub, Render, /version and APK SHA match
- Staged timeout behavior is implemented
- Backend status/retry/cancel/idempotency works
- All send roots use one orchestrator
- Automated tests pass
- Production Owner AI request succeeds
- Final APK is downloadable
- Real Android test no longer shows the timeout banner

No evidence = NOT VERIFIED.
